name: reunion
description: Reunite with every AI conversation. Aggregate, search, read and export local Cursor / Claude Code / Codex agent chats.
author: MeCKodo

scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:backend
scripts.electron:team: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=team pnpm run build && electron .
scripts.electron:personal: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=personal pnpm run build && electron .
scripts.dist:mac:team: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=team pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac:team:arm64: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=team pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac:team:x64: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=team pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac:personal: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=personal pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.personal.yml
scripts.dist:mac:personal:arm64: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=personal pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.personal.yml
scripts.dist:mac:personal:x64: cross-env REUNION_EDITION=personal pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.personal.yml
